raw_consumer_statement: My Citi credit card haven't been used for almost a year and suddenly has a fradulent transaction totaling {$1400.00} ( made on XX/XX/year> ). I disputed this with Citibank but they rejected my disputes saying the card was in my possession. I asked Citibank to reopen the dispute because this is definitely a fradulent transaction and someone else could deplicate the card and made the transaction. They refuse to reopen the investigation and ask me to pay the fradulent amount {$1400.00} plus fees and interests. This is a very large amount to me and negatively affects my living and mental health a lot.
